html:
Exclusive to:
See also: Floating Platform

The Grass Raft is a structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be created by launching a Grass Raft Kit into the Ocean.

Once placed, the raft constantly loses durability at a rate of 0.2 per second. Unlike the normal Boat, the Grass Raft cannot be pierced, and the raft's durability can only be restored with Cut Grass, which restores 13 . It loses 30 durability when attacked by a Cookie Cutter and 50 when attacked by a Gnarwail. Each geyser of the Crab King takes away 10 durability.

While moving the raft leaves behind small tufts of grass, indicating the constant destruction of the vessel. When the durability of the raft ends, it gets wet and crumbles. When completely destroyed, six tufts of grass remain on the water.

A Captain's Tricorn, when worn, reduces the rate of durability loss by 2 times.

Contents

  • 1 Grass Raft Kit
  • 2 Skins
  • 3 Assets
  • 4 Gallery

Grass Raft Kit

The Grass Raft Kit is a craftable item exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. It can be created from the Seafaring Filter and is used to create a smaller version of the Boat.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Swashbuckler Collection
Scallywag Raft
A bare-bones design for the penny-pinchin' privateer.

The Grass Raft is a structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be created by launching a Grass Raft Kit into the Ocean.
Once placed, the raft constantly loses durability at a rate of 0.2 per second. Unlike the normal Boat, the Grass Raft cannot be pierced, and the raft's durability can only be restored with Cut Grass, which restores 13 . It loses 30 durability when attacked by a Cookie Cutter and 50 when attacked by a Gnarwail. Each geyser of the Crab King takes away 10 durability.

Grass Raft Kit[edit | edit source]
Grass Raft Kit
"Fun for a quick weekend getaway."

Filters
Miscellaneous
"boat_grass_item"
“It's technically a boat.”
–Wilson
“But it won't be as flammable if I put it in the water!”
–Willow
“Will tiny grass boat even carry Wolfgang?”
–Wolfgang
“It will make a rather flimsy boat. I'll likely drown.”
–Wendy
“FOR BUILDING AN EVEN MORE HORRIBLE BOAT”
–WX-78
“Its durability is questionable, but it will do for now.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'd rather have a boat made of good, dependable wood.”
–Woodie
“Am I building a boat or weaving a basket?”
–Maxwell
“'Tis a piteous ship, but I shall make do.”
–Wigfrid
“Weaving a grass boat probably isn't much harder than weaving webs.”
–Webber
“It won't go far, but we must start somewhere, non?”
–Warly
“Friends help make Floaty”
–Wormwood
“Don't expect to build somethin' that's gonna last with cheap materials.”
–Winona
“This grass will pass for a boat, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Little boat way easier to make, flort.”
–Wurt
“You have to make do with what you have out in the wilderness!”
–Walter
“That certainly won't stand the test of time.”
–Wanda
The Grass Raft Kit is a craftable item exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. It can be created from the Seafaring Filter and is used to create a smaller version of the Boat.

{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}{{See also|Floating Platform}} {{Object Infobox |name = Grass Raft |image = Grass Raft.png |healthBoat = 200 |spawnCode = "boat_grass" |repaired = Repaired By: {{Pic|24|Cut Grass}} |perk = Can hold multiple players.
Can hold structures.}} The '''Grass Raft''' is a structure exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can be created by launching a Grass Raft Kit into the [[Ocean]]. Once placed, the raft constantly loses [[durability]] at a rate of 0.2 {{Hull}} per second. Unlike the normal [[Boat]], the Grass Raft cannot be pierced, and the raft's durability can only be restored with [[Cut Grass]], which restores 13 {{Hull}}. It loses 30 durability when attacked by a [[Cookie Cutter]] and 50 when attacked by a [[Gnarwail]]. Each geyser of the [[Crab King]] takes away 10 durability. While moving the raft leaves behind small tufts of grass, indicating the constant destruction of the vessel. When the durability of the raft ends, it gets wet and crumbles. When completely destroyed, six tufts of grass remain on the water. A [[Captain's Tricorn]], when worn, reduces the rate of durability loss by 2 times. {{Clear}} ==Grass Raft Kit== {{Object Infobox |canBeBurned=1 |burnTime = [[File:Light_Sources_Filter.png|32px|link=Fuel#Fire Fuel]] 3 min. |name = Grass Raft Kit |image = Grass Raft Kit Dropped.png |icon = Grass Raft Kit.png |ingredient1 = Cut Grass |multiplier1 = 8 |ingredient2 = Twigs |multiplier2 = 2 |filter = {{Pic32|Seafaring_Filter}} |spawnCode = "boat_grass_item" |stack = Does not stack |description = Fun for a quick weekend getaway.}} {{Quotes |wilson = It's technically a boat. |willow = But it won't be as flammable if I put it in the water! |wolfgang = Will tiny grass boat even carry Wolfgang? |wendy = It will make a rather flimsy boat.
